evals.prompt: I want to turn my Shopify product URL into a video ad for TikTok
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step URL-to-Video walkthrough with TikTok format and avatar guidance

assertions.name: url_to_video
assertions.description: Describes the URL-to-Video feature — paste product URL and Tagshop extracts content

assertions.name: avatar_script
assertions.description: Covers avatar selection and script editing before rendering

evals.prompt: How do I add a shoppable Instagram gallery to my product pages?
evals.expected_output: Shoppable UGC gallery setup with Instagram collection and product tagging

assertions.name: shopify_app
assertions.description: Mentions the Taggbox Shopify app or ecommerce integration

assertions.name: content_collection
assertions.description: Covers content collection from Instagram (hashtags, mentions)

assertions.name: product_tagging
assertions.description: Explains AI product tagging or manual product tagging for shoppable hotspots

evals.prompt: I want to create an AI Twin so I don't have to film myself for every ad
evals.expected_output: AI Twin setup with source material requirements and reuse workflow

assertions.name: ai_twin_feature
assertions.description: Explains AI Twin feature — clone appearance and voice

assertions.name: source_material
assertions.description: Mentions requirement for high-quality reference photos/video

assertions.name: reusability
assertions.description: Describes reusability across multiple future videos
